title: Irish Potato Cakes with Creamy Bisque
description: A hearty, comforting dish featuring crispy Irish potato cakes served alongside a rich and creamy bisque. This recipe is perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a large bowl, combine grated potatoes, onion, garlic, flour, and grated cheddar. Mix well.
Cut the flaky pastry into small squares. Add a tablespoon of butter to each square and fold into a triangle.
Place the pastry triangles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the pastry is baking, heat the butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the cream and chicken broth. Bring to a simmer and cook until the bisque has thickened slightly.
Divide the potato mixture among the baked pastry triangles. Serve with the creamy bisque spooned over the top.
